{"id":"smallhold-67d1","title":"Status serialization: all required fields, correct types, match mastodon.social","description":"Implement Status serialization to JSON. Every field must match mastodon.social exactly. Critical invariants: id is quoted string; media_attachments/mentions/tags/emojis are always [] never null; in_reply_to_id is string-or-null never empty string; reblog is null for regular posts and full nested Status for boosts; visibility is exactly one of {public, unlisted, private, direct}; content is the HTML rendered content not raw markdown.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch 20 different Status objects from mastodon.social (with replies, boosts, media, no media, various visibilities) and build a comprehensive oracle test set.

Test discipline:
- Each field tested against mastodon.social oracle
- Test Status for a boost: outer has empty content, reblog is full nested Status
- Test Status with no media: media_attachments is [] not null
- Test Status that is a reply: in_reply_to_id is '12345' (string) not 12345 (number)
- Snapshot tests (use insta crate): serialize a known Status, compare against frozen snapshot

Defensive programming:
- Use a dedicated StatusResponse struct (not the DB model) for serialization — never accidentally include DB-internal fields","acceptance_criteria":"All fields present and correctly typed per mastodon.social oracle; arrays never null; in_reply_to_id is string-or-null; boost has full nested reblog","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:34:57Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:34:57Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-3l1","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:35:04Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
